macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Silver Prices Crash $10 in Three Days Amid High COMEX Leverage and Low Inventories
items.summary: Silver dropped from $90.39 to $79.35 intraday on March 13, closing at $80.45, with COMEX leverage at 7.28x and inventories at a 12-month low. The dollar index broke above 100 ahead of the Fed meeting on March 17.

items.title: S&P 500 Experiences 5% Pullback, MAG 7 Stocks Down Double Digits YTD
items.summary: S&P 500 down 5% in a mild pullback, with all Magnificent 7 stocks declining YTD—Nvidia -3%, Microsoft -18%—while international and small/midcap stocks outperform. Private credit and equity firms like Carlyle and Blue Owl see sharp declines.

items.title: S&P 500 Triggers Multi-Year Bear Market Signal with Breakdown Below 6,790
items.summary: S&P 500 confirmed a rounded top breakdown below 6,790, targeting 5,600 in 6-12 months amid oil-driven stagflation parallels to 2008. Warnings of a potential 'lost decade' of zero returns similar to dot-com bust.

items.title: Fed Expected to Hold Rates Steady at March 17 Meeting, No Cuts Until October
items.summary: FOMC meeting on March 17 likely a non-event with rates unchanged and market pricing no cuts until October, just one more this year. Focus shifts to Fed language on growth vs. inflation amid low rate cut odds under 5%.

items.title: S&P 500 Faces Further Downside Risk Below 200-Day Moving Average
items.summary: S&P 500 at risk of deeper declines toward November lows around 6,500 and below 200-day moving average, with poor risk-reward for near-term rallies. Forecasts suggest potential 3-week swing lower.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Clarity Act Crypto Legislation Faces Low Passage Odds in 2026
items.summary: The crypto market structure legislation, Clarity Act, may not pass in 2026 if it fails committee by end of April, according to Galaxy Digital's Alex Thorne. Senate floor time is running out, diminishing odds daily.

items.title: NASDAQ Develops Framework for Blockchain-Based Tokenized Shares
items.summary: NASDAQ is creating a framework for publicly listed companies to issue blockchain-based tokenized shares while preserving traditional rights, partnering with Payword (Kraken's parent). Launch planned for first half of 2027.

items.title: ICE Invests in OKX at $25 Billion Valuation for Tokenized Assets
items.summary: ICE revealed a strategic investment in crypto exchange OKX valued at $25 billion, including plans for tokenized stocks in crypto futures to leverage OKX's user base.

items.title: Ethereum Network Activity Explodes with AI Agent Settlements
items.summary: Ethereum Layer 2 Base and Solana handle 97% of machine-to-machine transactions for AI agents, with monthly transactions across L1s and L2s nearing 1.1 billion, up significantly year-over-year. Ethereum staking hits all-time high at nearly 31% of supply.
items.source: WATCH OUT!! Crypto is about to get LEGIT CRAZY

items.title: Bitcoin Continues Relief Rally Amid Stock Market Crash Warnings
items.summary: Bitcoin is in a relief rally with positive weekly chart signals like RSI moving from oversold, but stock market indicators suggest a potential crash ahead.

items.title: Critical FOMC Week Could Trigger Major Bitcoin Volatility
items.summary: Upcoming FOMC meeting amid rising inflation, economic slowdown, and stagflation risks may cause extreme volatility; Bitcoin recently chased stops above $74,000, potentially a bullish breakout or trap.
items.source: URGENT BITCOIN! CRUCIAL WEEK AND BIG NEWS!

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: H2O.ai's H2OVL Mississippi Models Reach Over One Million Monthly Downloads
items.summary: H2O.ai announces its H2OVL Mississippi models have surpassed one million monthly downloads, gaining significant momentum ahead of GTC 2026.

items.title: Commonwealth Cyber Initiative Funds $1.9M for AI Cybersecurity Projects
items.summary: Virginia’s Commonwealth Cyber Initiative awards $1.9 million to 19 projects, including multiple AI-driven initiatives for securing critical infrastructure like power grids and water networks.

items.title: Google Impact Challenge Offers $30M for AI in Government Services
items.summary: Google launches a $30 million Impact Challenge to fund partnerships deploying generative and agentic AI solutions to improve government services.

items.title: IBM Highlights Verifiable AI as Top Trend for 2026
items.summary: IBM identifies verifiable AI—emphasizing grounding, scope, provenance, and drift awareness—as a key trend for 2026 amid calls for explainable AI decisions.

items.title: AI Revolutionizes Weather Forecasting with Superior Accuracy
items.summary: AI models from IBM, Google DeepMind, and others outperform traditional physics-based systems by up to 20%, predicting hurricanes 12 hours further while using far less energy.

items.title: Global AI Cloud Market Expands Rapidly on Machine Learning Demand
items.summary: The AI cloud market is growing quickly due to surging demand for machine learning infrastructure, as reported on March 16, 2026.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: China Leads Globally in Anti-Drone Technology Patents
items.summary: China is significantly outpacing other countries in filing patents for anti-drone technologies, according to a specialist law firm. This development underscores China's dominance in defensive tech innovations.

items.title: Samsung Bioepis Issues Key Business Press Release
items.summary: Samsung Bioepis Co., Ltd. released a press statement on March 15, highlighting significant company updates in the biotech sector. Details point to advancements in biosimilars and pharmaceutical developments.

items.title: Pentagon Invests $1 Billion in L-3Harris for Solid Rocket Motors
items.summary: The U.S. Pentagon provided a $1 billion equity stake to L-3Harris, which owns Aerojet, to boost production of solid rocket motors amid high missile consumption in ongoing conflicts. This addresses critical supply chain needs for defense technology.

items.title: France to Supply Ukraine with Advanced SAMP/T NG Missile System
items.summary: France plans to deliver the newest SAMP/T NG anti-aircraft missile system to Ukraine for testing against Russian ballistic missiles. This represents a major upgrade in air defense technology support.
items.source: Institute for the Study of War (ISW)
